display.purpose: Public hero, service, confirmation, and preview headings only.

headline.purpose: Admin page titles and major section headings.

body.purpose: Default readable text for booking forms, admin panels, descriptions, and metadata.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, filters, status labels, metadata, and compact control labels.

shadows.name: admin-panel
shadows.purpose: Default admin panel and page intro depth.

shadows.name: admin-list
shadows.purpose: Lighter collection shell and card depth.

shadows.name: brand-panel
shadows.purpose: Public hero and primary booking panel depth.

motion.name: admin-state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, link, input, and color state transitions.

motion.name: admin-feedback
motion.purpose: Calm validation and save feedback reveal.

motion.name: collection-enter
motion.purpose: Card and list view transitions in admin collections.

rules: Public customer-facing personalization starts in /admin/branding and flows through lib/branding.ts, CSS variables, and brand asset routes.
Admin pages stay neutral unless a task explicitly requests branded admin UI; /admin/branding is the controlled exception for public preview.
Public MVP, template, slice, and demo wording is intentional while the product is being evaluated as a reusable demo.
Booking forms should group choices into service/staff, date/slot, and customer details.

Booking forms should expose clear state: pressed selected slots, polite loading or empty-state announcements, alert semantics for errors, retry actions for availability failures, autocomplete on customer fields, and disabled confirmation until required fields plus a slot are complete.
Booking summaries should stay visible on larger screens when there is room.
Admin modals should trap focus, restore focus on close, keep Escape-close behavior, and preserve scroll lock while open.
Calendar item buttons should expose clear labels and pressed selected state.
Calendar day and week grids may scroll horizontally on narrow screens instead of compressing event columns below readable widths.
Admin navigation should expose the active section with aria-current and visible primary styling.
Admin collection controls should pair icons with visible text labels.
Destructive admin actions should require explicit acknowledgement and keep the destructive button disabled until acknowledgement is checked.
Use 1px borders and tonal layers before stronger shadows.
Respect reduced-motion preferences for admin transitions.
Do not rely on color alone for validation, status, or appointment state.

components.name: Public Primary Button
components.description: Primary booking action on public pages.
components.html: Start booking
components.css: .brand-accent-fill { background-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-foreground) !important; } @media (hover: hover) { .brand-accent-fill:hover { background-color: var(--accent-strong); } }

components.name: Admin Primary Button
components.description: Primary admin save or create action.
components.css: .admin-button-primary { min-height: 2.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; background: #0f172a; color: #f8fafc; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .admin-button-primary:hover { background: #1e293b; }

components.name: Admin Panel
components.description: Standard admin shell for page intros, filter panels, editors, and previews.
components.html: Panel title
components.css: .admin-panel { border: 1px solid #d6dde5; border-radius: 1rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px -24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.22); }

components.name: Admin Field
components.description: Default admin text, search, select, and textarea vocabulary.
components.css: .admin-input { min-height: 2.75rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; transition: border-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease; } .admin-input:focus { border-color: #64748b; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.18); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact appointment and collection state marker.
components.css: .admin-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #d8dee6; background: #f8fafc; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #475569; } .admin-status-badge-confirmed { border-color: #cbd5e1; background: #0f172a; color: #f8fafc; }
